out_of_scope_note: Clinical-application systematic review on music and emotion regulation, framed for music therapy practice guidance. The abstract summarizes activation patterns (preferred/familiar music, singing, improvisation vs. complexity/dissonance) at a descriptive clinical level, engages no theoretical framework of perception/decision/encoding (no predictive coding, efficient coding, rate-distortion, Bayesian observer, drift-diffusion, normalization, etc.), reports no parametric manipulation or computational model, and explicitly targets implications for music therapy practice. Falls under the OOS category of clinical/therapeutic guidance without neural-computational content.
